# mxroute_spam_whitelist_entry (Resource)

Manages a single entry in a domain's spam whitelist. The whitelist is a set of address patterns, so there is no in-place update: changing `domain` or `entry` replaces the resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain whose spam whitelist the entry belongs to (e.g. `example.com`).
- `entry` (String) The whitelist entry — an address or pattern to always accept (wildcards like `*@trusted.com` are supported).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier — `<domain>/<entry>`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# A whitelist entry is imported by "<domain>/<entry>".
terraform import mxroute_spam_whitelist_entry.example example.com/friend@good.example
```
